page.title: The Company
page.source:
The Company

Consulting - Engineering - Project Management

UNLOCKING WEALTH THROUGH ENGINEERING INGENUITY

Africa offers an abundance of raw resources and opportunities, and we focus on translating these opportunities into wealth.

Since our inception in 1978, we have been an independent engineering firm of planners, designers, engineers, financial consultants, project managers, technical specialists, and facility managers working across the full spectrum of today’s infrastructure and built landscape.

In collaboration with our clients, we convert exciting ideas into tangible projects and sustainable solutions. Our strategy is to offer involvement not only at planning and engineering stages of new infrastructure and built developments, but also to provide pre-planning and after-sales support sometimes needed to successfully set-up, run and sustain new business ventures and infrastructure projects.

We offer complete innovative engineered solutions with legal compliance throughout the project life-cycle.

OUR CAPABILITIES & SERVICES

BURMEISTER & PARTNERS is a multi-disciplinary consulting engineering company, offering the full spectrum of civil, structural, mechanical, electrical and project management services with over 45 years’ local and African experience.

Our business philosophy is to be fluid, responsive and adaptable to the ever-changing industry demands, to create smart, creative and sustainable solutions for our clients whilst having due regard for the environmental, social and economic realities.

It is this philosophy that has kept our company sound, relevant and steadfast. Our over-45-years of experience has ensured an intrinsic understanding and knowledge of the Namibian and African engineering industry market demands. Following hereafter are digests of our diverse skills gained which translate into the professional services we can offer to you.

Our services may be provided in conjunction with specialists in the required fields (Geotechnical Investigations, Environmental Impact Assessments, Surveys, etc.). All services are provided in different engineering stages, namely, Reporting, Preliminary & Detail Design, Tender Documentation & Process, Construction Supervision & Contract Administration, Project Management. Our Clients may elect to appoint us for all the stages, or for a specific selection based on their relevant needs. However, having one Consultant oversee and carry out all the stages is desirous as the project benefits vastly from having only one Consultant Management Team.
